blocks.text: Arsenal demolish Spurs 4-1 — Gunners five points clear at the summit
🎮 Sun 16:00 — PGL Cluj-Napoca CS2 Major Grand Final — two teams battle for the most prestigious title in CS2
Norway's greatest Champions League night approaches. Bodo/Glimt travel to San Siro on Tuesday with a 3-1 first-leg lead. History is within touching distance.
